prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等热门专业社会热度高，但新疆大学相关专业录取位次靠 前（如计算机科学与技术2025年约24083名），与校最低位次差距较大；本省2026年考生总数约53.5万人，物理类按历史比例估算约32.9万人，较2025年物理类约28.5万人大幅增 加，竞争加剧；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐，距四川较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次70843名、2026年大幅扩招53.3%、本省考生总数增加约15.5%以及地域偏远等因素，扩招效应占主导，位次预计明显后移。但考虑到考生总数增加和热门专业竞争，后移幅度略作收窄。预测 最低位次约91482名，区间90982-91982名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 79,938; in 2023, approximately 55,637; in 2024, approximately 46,505; in 2025, for physics category (first choice physics, no restriction on second choice), approximately 70,843. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past four years. After consecutive advances in 2023-2024, there was a notable backward shift in 2025 due to the new Gaokao subject group division, with a baseline rank of approximately 70,843 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for physics category: 105 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 97 in 2024, 107 in 2025, and a substantial expansion to 164 in 2026, an increase of 57 students compared to 2025, a growth of approximately 53.3%. The significant expansion implies relatively eased competition pressure, with a tendency for rank numbers to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not a 985; ranked approximately 131st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 127-136 in recent years, belonging to mid-to-lower tier 211 universities; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 72nd, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; no negative or positive public opinion events related to Xinjiang University found in reputation files; no record of enrollment gaps in the enrollment anomaly files. Overall application attention is at a moderately low level; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University did not enter A- or above grades, with no significant advantageous disciplines to attract high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication have high social popularity, but the admission ranks for related majors at Xinjiang University are relatively high (e.g., Computer Science and Technology approximately 24,083 in 2025), with a large gap from the university's minimum rank; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 535,000, with physics category estimated at about 329,000 based on historical proportions, a significant increase from approximately 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Sichuan, and cross-province applications are subject to geographical preference effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 70,843, the substantial enrollment expansion of 53.3% in 2026, the increase in provincial candidates by approximately 15.5%, and factors such as remote location, the expansion effect dominates, and the rank is expected to shift significantly backward. However, taking into account the increase in candidate numbers and competition for popular majors, the backward shift is slightly narrowed. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 91,482, with a range of 90,982-91,982.

Xinjiang University has no A- or above discipline evaluation data, so when choosing majors, it is recommended to prioritize engineering majors with high social popularity and good employment prospects.
